description: Valid EIP-712 offer with scheme: upto on EVM - PEAC preserves and term-matches the scheme identifier without interpreting upto-specific invariants
notes: Scheme-agnostic pass-through: PEAC term-matches scheme: upto as a required string alongside network, asset, payTo, and amount. PEAC does NOT enforce upto-specific invariants (single-use authorization, time bounds, recipient binding, facilitator binding, max-amount enforcement, phase-dependent amount). Those are the x402 scheme layer's responsibility. This fixture documents the evidence-preservation contract. See docs/specs/X402-PROFILE.md § 3.0 for the normative statement.
